title: hydrocotyle hirsuta var. moschata
intro: Hydrocotyle hirsuta var. moschata, also known as the musky-leafed pennywort or musky pennywort, is a variety of the Hydrocotyle hirsuta plant, a type of aquatic or terrestrial plant in the family Araliaceae. Traditionally, Hydrocotyle hirsuta var. moschata has been used for its medicinal properties, which include being a demulcent and an expectorant, used to soothe and protect mucous membranes while also helping to relieve coughs and congestion. The health benefits of the plant are attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and improve overall health. Hydrocotyle hirsuta var. moschata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use and preparation should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
